reasoning: The stock price recently closed at $44.01 on March 13 (the reference price for the March 15 forecast date). This is right at the newly upgraded analyst price target of $44.00, meaning further immediate upside may be capped in the short term. The yfinance tool provides a linear trend extrapolation that suggests a higher price (0.52 probability), but an N=1 seasonal effect brings the combined estimate down to 0.43. Ex-dividend implications are nil because the ex-dividend date was in February, and the next earnings report is not due until late April or early May (Q4 was mid-February). Given the somewhat capped analyst expectations and recent run up back to $44.01, a slight bias towards mean-reversion pushes the baseline 50/50 stock drift down to ~48%.
